snippet.title: Paatashaala -Yuvarathnaa(Kannada) | Puneeth Rajkumar|Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash|Hombale Films
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', a lyrical video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's upcoming Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Song Details:
Song Name : Paatashaala
Singer : Vijay Prakash
Lyricist : Santhosh Ananddram
Music Director : Thaman S

snippet.title: Dhamaka | Official Teaser | Kartik Aaryan | Ram Madhvani | Netflix India
snippet.description:
Sometimes all it takes is one phone call to change lives.

A frustrated ex-news anchor is given another chance to go live on prime time television when a terrorist calls him with a bomb threat. Little does he know that this call will change his life and throw him into a fast-paced game of betrayal.

Catch Kartik Aaryan in an intense, never seen before avatar, in Dhamaka, coming soon on Netflix.

A Netflix Original film 
RSVP and Ram Madhvani Films present 
In association with 
Lotte Cultureworks, Global Gate Entertainment 

Directed by Ram Madhvani
Producers: Ronnie Screwvala, Amita Madhvani & Ram Madhvani

Executive Producer: Rhea Prabhu, Sia Bhuyan
Associate Producer: Sushmita Yadav
DOP: Manu Anand
Writer: Puneet Sharma
VFX Director: Biju Dhanapalan 
Editors: Monisha Baldawa, Amit Karia
Action Director: Manohar Verma
Line Producer: Sumit Kumar
Associate Directors: Kayoze Irani, Shraddha Pasi
First AD: Paarth Joshi
Costume Stylist: Theia Tekchandaney
Production Designers: Nidhi Rungta, Richard Viagulam
Sound Recordist: Bhabani Mallick
HMU Stylist: Jay Kanojia

Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2Oufg8z

snippet.title: Kevin O‚ÄôBrien's record century against England in famous World Cup win | #CWC11Rewind
snippet.description:
Ireland produced one of the biggest shocks in world cup history as they overcame England in Bengaluru. 

After being set an imposing target of 328 by England, as Jonathan Trott (92) narrowly missed out on a World Cup century & right-arm seamer John Mooney returned excellent figures of 4/63. 

Ireland‚Äôs run chase got off to the worst possible start as they lost captain William Porterfield to the first ball of the innings. And it wouldn‚Äôt be until the loss of Ireland‚Äôs 5th wicket that their run-chase started to pick up serious momentum. As the pair of Kevin O‚ÄôBrien and Alex Cusack put on a remarkable 162 runs for the 6th wicket partnership, a World Cup record stand.

That wouldn‚Äôt be the only record to be broken as Kevin O‚ÄôBrien‚Äôs herculean 100 off just 50 balls became the fastest World Cup century in the tournament's history. Guiding Ireland to the brink of victory O‚ÄôBrien finally fell, leaving the winning moment to John Mooney as his boundary sealed victory for Ireland and sparked scenes of jubilation. 

A true World Cup classic and quite possibly the biggest shock in the tournament's history. A famous Irish victory ‚ėėÔłŹ

Join us to celebrate 10 years since the iconic 2011 Men‚Äôs Cricket World Cup. A festival of cricket featuring some of the biggest sixes, greatest wickets, and a countless number of moments that inspired a generation.

Follow #CWC11Rewind across all our digital and social platforms up until 2nd April.

On our Website: https://www.icc-cricket.com/
On Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/icc 
On Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/icc/
On Twitter: https://twitter.com/ICC

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | ŗ§§ŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ§ē ŗ§ģŗ•áŗ§Ļŗ§§ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§ĺ ŗ§Čŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§üŗ§ĺ ŗ§öŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§ģŗ§ĺ | Episode 583 | 1st March, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 583: Popatlal Gives A Shock
-------------------------------------
Bhide and Madhavi are still in their dreamland, where they are rich and affluent. Meanwhile, at Abdul's soda shop, Popatlal informs everyone about the rampant email frauds taking place these days.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

Episode 3114: Can Jethalal Save His Ancestor's Land?
---------------------------------------------------------
Everyone is all set to go for the Land deal but Jethalal is still against selling his ancestor's land. Jethalal asks Champaklal to not sell the land but Champaklal says this is to only option left so to save his ancestor's land Jethalal ran away with land paper. Iyer asks Jethalal if he will not sell the land how will he deliver the 100 Tabs. Can Jethalal Save His Ancestor's Land? Who will Jethalal Deliver the 100 Tabs?. Catch the fun and watch the full episode on SonyLIV.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Flight: Official Trailer | Mohit C | Suraj J | K Chadda | 19th March 2021 | Reliance Ent, UFO Moviez
snippet.description:
Flight mode: ON!
Witness the ultimate #FightToSurvive in #Flight, in cinemas on 19th March 2021. 
#FlightTrailer out now!

The movie follows the journey of Ranveer Malhotra, who against all the odds, has to face deadly obstacles on a plane in order to survive.

Actors - Mohit Chadda, Pavan Malhotra, Zakir Hussain, Viveck Vaswani, Shibani Bedi, Pritam Singh
Director - Suraj Joshi
Producers - K. Chadda, Babita Ashiwal, Mohit Chadda, Suraj Joshi

snippet.title: Bike Lift Prachanaigal | Veyilon Entertainment
snippet.description:
VAADI RASATHI channel link : https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCA5pBHQ2mBnlltenAdgXNPQ/featured

Giving lift and asking for lift. Many of us would have faced atleast one of these two situations. Now this video is all about this. we have imagined a few situations where people ask for lifts, trying to trick others to stop their bikes by using some genius techniques. 

Watch this video till the end because we have come up with differet tips and tricks that you might wanna use them in your future.

Like, share, comment and subscribe.

snippet.title: King - Blanko | The Gorilla Bounce | Prod. by Section 8 | Latest Hit Songs 2021
snippet.description:
LYRICS:

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse 1

Maine Din bhi sudhaar liye,
Kapde bhi sawaar liye,
Abhi kitna kama rahe,
Tune chhote hi sawaal kiye.

Tera zikar chhupa liya,
Aur khudse malaal kiye,
Na soch sakoge tum
Humne itne kamaal kiye.

Afsos hota hai bas hume is baat ka,
Tum dil mein jaana kabhi nahi jhaanke.

Tum humse aisa pyaar kabhi kar na sake,
Jaisi ye duniya karti hain baatein.

Pre-chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya

Verse2

Faslon mein,
Bhi raza teri.
Mushkilon mein,
Kyu wafa meri.

Main hasun na,
Khwahishein teri,
Tu roye na,
Ye dua meri.

Jo mujhse door jayegi,
To jaana toot jayegi,
Ye duniya hai khayalon ki,
Tu sach mein ruth jayegi.

Main tujhse kya chhupaunga,
Tu mujhko kya btayegi,
Tu jab bhi aankhein band karle,
Saamne mujhko payegi.

Pre-Chorus

Sach bol na jaana,
Tu mujhse door kyu hai?

Tu ek din mil jayegi,
Ye mera fitoor hai.

CHORUS

Maahi ve!
Jo tu na mila
To phir kya hua?
Teri yaadon mein
Main jeeta rahaa.

Tere naam ki
Jo bheji dua
Sach ho na saki
Main karta bhi kya - 2.T

CREDITS:

Artist - King
Lyrics By King
Composed By King
Female Lead - Drutika Singh
Music Produced By Section 8
Mixing - Rahul Sathu
Master - Abhishek Ghatak

This album is in association with KingsclanMGMT.

Kingsclan Marketing.

Co-Produced By KingsClanMgmt
Directed By Miikey
Cinematography& Edit By Yash Chhabra
King‚Äôs Costume Designed By Drutika Singh
Digitally Handled By Shahu Shinde
Digital Promotions By KCM.

Shows, Business and Bookings ūüćĺūüĆĻ
ūüďģkingsclanmgmt@gmail.com

Episode 3113: Sunder Brings Sweets For Everyone
---------------------------------------------------------
Sunder arrives with Baka and another one of his friends at the Gada household and also brings sweets with him to celebrate the occasion of selling the plot. But Jethalal is still in a solemn mood. Jetha informs everyone of his plan to not go ahead with the sale of his plot. He explains why he came up with this change of heart and how his dream helped in changing the decision. About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.
tags: Jetha Reveals The Truth Of His Tension

snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äď our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.description:

ŗ§łŗ§® ŗ•®ŗ•¶ŗ•®ŗ•ß ŗ§Öŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§•ŗ§łŗ§āŗ§ēŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§™ŗ•Äŗ§Į ŗ§Öŗ§ßŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ§® ŗ§łŗ•čŗ§ģŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņ. ŗ•¶ŗ•ß ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ö ŗ•®ŗ•¶ŗ•®ŗ•ß ŗ§§ŗ•á ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§āŗ§ē ŗ•ßŗ•¶ ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ö ŗ•®ŗ•¶ŗ•®ŗ•ß ŗ§™ŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§āŗ§§ ŗ§Ķŗ§Ņŗ§ßŗ§ĺŗ§® ŗ§≠ŗ§Ķŗ§®, ŗ§ģŗ•Āŗ§āŗ§¨ŗ§ą ŗ§Įŗ•áŗ§•ŗ•á ŗ§Ļŗ•čŗ§£ŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§Üŗ§Ļŗ•á. ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§§ŗ•Äŗ§≤ ŗ§ēŗ•čŗ§įŗ•č_ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•ćŗ§Į ŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§≠ŗ•āŗ§ģŗ•Äŗ§Ķŗ§į ŗ§Üŗ§Ķŗ§∂ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ē ŗ§§ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Čŗ§™ŗ§ĺŗ§Įŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§úŗ§®ŗ§ĺ ŗ§ēŗ§įŗ•āŗ§® ŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Öŗ§ßŗ§Ņŗ§Ķŗ•áŗ§∂ŗ§®ŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ•á ŗ§®ŗ§Ņŗ§Įŗ•čŗ§úŗ§® ŗ§ēŗ§įŗ§£ŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§§ ŗ§Üŗ§≤ŗ•á ŗ§Üŗ§Ļŗ•á. ŗ§łŗ•čŗ§ģŗ§Ķŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņ. ŗ•ģ ŗ§ģŗ§ĺŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§ö ŗ§įŗ•čŗ§úŗ•Ä ŗ§įŗ§ĺŗ§úŗ•ćŗ§Įŗ§ĺŗ§öŗ§ĺ ŗ•®ŗ•¶ŗ•®ŗ•ß ‚Äď ŗ•®ŗ•® ŗ§Įŗ§ĺ ŗ§Ķŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§∑ŗ§ĺŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§†ŗ•Äŗ§öŗ§ĺ ŗ§Öŗ§įŗ•ćŗ§•ŗ§łŗ§āŗ§ēŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§™ ŗ§łŗ§ĺŗ§¶ŗ§į ŗ§ēŗ•áŗ§≤ŗ§ĺ ŗ§úŗ§ĺŗ§£ŗ§ĺŗ§į ŗ§Üŗ§Ļŗ•á.

snippet.title: The RelationShit | Anmol Sachar | Bhavika Motwani (Comedy Video)
snippet.description:
The RelationShit is a comedy video by Anmol Sachar ft Bhavika Motwani in which a boyfriend gets a video call from his annoying girlfriend who needs no reason to fight with him & picks a fight for every single thing he says. This leads to some super crazy situations & a funny conversation between the girlfriend & boyfriend who are surely experiencing pyaar ke side effects & realize that their relationship is more of a relationshit!

What happens in the end? Does the boyfriend get frustrated & speak up? Does he continue to remain silent and bear the torture because he loves his girl friend? Does the girl realize that she‚Äôs not treating him right Or is there an unexpected twist in this BF Vs GF tale?

Yeh sab pata karne ke liye video end takk zaroor dekhna! I promise you will love it!

snippet.title: Gangubai Kathiawadi | Official Teaser | Sanjay Leela Bhansali, Alia Bhatt | 30th July 2021
snippet.description:
Gangubai Kathiawadi - A story, based on the book ‚Äú Mafia Queens of Mumbai‚ÄĚ written by  S. Hussain Zaidi, is a film that celebrates the rise of a simple girl from Kathiawad who had no choice but to embrace the ways of destiny and swing it in her favour.

The narrative walks through the life of young Ganga who in no time marks her own territory and becomes Gangubai ‚Äď The Matriarch of Kamathipura.

Once again, Sanjay Leela Bhansali brings to his audience a moving yet stem-winding story with power-packed performances laced in his magical musical notes.
With a promise to make one and all feel inspired in 2021 as Gangubai Kathiawadi celebrates the journey of a girl who became the voice for women empowerment.

Bhansali Productions & PEN Studios  Present
A Film by Sanjay Leela Bhansali
Produced by: Sanjay Leela Bhansali & Dr. Jayantilal Gada (Pen Studios)

In Cinemas: July 30, 2021

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - Episode 732 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana‚Äôs singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn‚Äôt care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana‚Äôs singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

snippet.description:
#Dhee13KingsvsQueens #Dhee13 #ETVTelugu #ETVWin #SudigaaliSudheer #Rashmi  #PradeepMachiraju #HyperAadi #SekharMaster  #MounikaPilli #Poorna #Priyamani

ŗį¶ŗįēŗĪćŗį∑ŗį£ ŗį≠ŗįĺŗįįŗį§ŗį¶ŗĪáŗį∂ŗįāŗį≤ŗĪč ŗįÖŗį§ŗįŅŗį™ŗĪÜŗį¶ŗĪćŗį¶ ŗį°ŗįĺŗį®ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗįĺŗį≤ŗįŅŗįüŗĪÄ ŗį∑ŗĪč "ŗįĘŗĪÄ".... 12 ŗįłŗĪÄŗįúŗį®ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįģŗĪĀŗįóŗįŅŗįāŗįöŗĪĀŗįēŗĪäŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįáŗį™ŗĪćŗį™ŗĪĀŗį°ŗĪĀ  ŗįĘŗĪÄ ŗįēŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪćŗįłŗĪć v/s ŗįēŗĪćŗįĶŗĪÄŗį®ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ("ŗįĘŗĪÄ" 13ŗįĶ ŗįłŗĪÄŗįúŗį®ŗĪć) ŗįóŗįĺ ŗįģŗįŅŗįģŗĪćŗįģŗį≤ŗĪćŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįÖŗį≤ŗįįŗįŅŗįāŗįöŗį°ŗįĺŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗįŅ ŗįĶŗĪáŗįįŗĪá ŗį≤ŗĪÜŗįĶŗį≤ŗĪć ŗįéŗįāŗįüŗįįŗĪć ŗįüŗĪąŗį®ŗĪć ŗįģŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć ŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįÖŗįāŗį¶ŗįŅŗįāŗįöŗį°ŗįĺŗį®ŗįŅŗįēŗįŅ ŗįłŗįŅŗį¶ŗĪćŗį¶ŗįģŗĪąŗįāŗį¶ŗįŅ. ŗįēŗįŅŗįāŗįóŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįüŗĪÄŗįģŗĪć ŗįēŗįŅ ŗįłŗĪĀŗį°ŗįŅŗįóŗįĺŗį≤ŗįŅ ŗįłŗĪĀŗįßŗĪÄŗįįŗĪć & ŗįĻŗĪąŗį™ŗįįŗĪć ŗįÜŗį¶ŗįŅ, ŗįēŗĪćŗįĶŗĪÄŗį®ŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗįüŗĪÄŗįģŗĪć ŗįēŗįŅ ŗįįŗĪáŗį∑ŗĪćŗįģŗįŅ & ŗįüŗįŅŗįēŗĪć ŗįüŗįĺŗįēŗĪć ŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗįĺŗįįŗĪć ŗį¶ŗĪÄŗį™ŗįŅŗįēŗįĺ... ŗįúŗį°ŗĪćŗįúŗĪÜŗįłŗĪć ŗįóŗįĺ ŗį∂ŗĪáŗįĖŗįįŗĪć ŗįģŗįĺŗįłŗĪćŗįüŗįįŗĪć ŗįóŗįĺŗįįŗĪĀ ŗįĻŗĪÄŗįįŗĪčŗįĮŗįŅŗį®ŗĪć ŗį™ŗĪćŗįįŗįŅŗįĮŗįģŗį£ŗįŅ ŗįĶŗĪćŗįĮŗįĶŗįĻŗįįŗįŅŗįłŗĪćŗį§ŗįĺŗįįŗĪĀ.

snippet.title: Gaali Sampath Movie Trailer | Sree Vishnu | Rajendra Prasad | Anil Ravipudi | Anish Krishna | Achu
snippet.description:
Gaali Sampath Telugu Movie Trailer on Shine Screens. #GaaliSampath Latest 2021 Telugu Movie ft. Sree Vishnu, Rajendra Prasad, Lovely Singh, Tanikella Bharani and Sathya. Presented by Anil Ravipudi. Directed by Anish Krishna and Produced by S Krishna under Imagespark Entertainment in association with Shine Screens. Music composed by Achu Rajamani. Gaali Sampath movie is all set to hit the big screens on March 11th, 2021.

#ChakravyuhOnMX #MXOriginalSeries #MXPlayer

Directed by Sajit Warrier

Key Cast: Prateik Babbar, Simran Kaur Mundi, Ashish Vidyarthi, Shiv Panditt, Gopal Datt, Ruhi Singh, Karan Raj, Ayesha Kanga, Rohan Joshi, Ankit Narang, Mahir Pandi, Twinkle Tshering, Asif Basra, Anjali Sivaraman and NaghmaRizwan 

About Chakravyuh - An Inspector Virkar Crime Thriller:
When a college student gets murdered in a ghastly manner, Inspector Virkar from the Crime Branch gets called in. As Virkar investigates, he stumbles upon a ruthless gang of young, tech-savvy miscreants who use social networking sites and the dark web for blackmail and extortion. But how are the cases linked? Who is the mastermind behind these killings? As the case grows murkier, Virkar finds himself out of his depth, chasing a killer who always seems to be one step ahead. Virkar must race against time to unmask the gang and find the murderer before it‚Äôs too late.
